Mauro Sunda

      Mauro Sunda

      Cybersecurity student passionate about DFIR, CTFs, and security research.

      About Me

      Hi, I’m Mauro Sunda

      I’m a cybersecurity student based in Melbourne, Australia, passionate about Digital Forensics & Incident Response (DFIR), network security, and solving CTF challenges. This portfolio showcases my journey in cybersecurity through hands-on projects, lab work, and continuous learning.

      Education

      Bachelor of Cybersecurity
      Currently Pursuing

      Focused on developing practical skills in:

      • Digital forensics and incident response
      • Network security analysis
      • Secure coding practices
      • Threat detection and analysis

      Technical Skills

      Forensics & Incident Response

      • Tools: Autopsy, FTK Imager, Volatility
      • Skills: Memory forensics, disk analysis, timeline analysis, evidence preservation

      Network Security

      • Tools: Wireshark, Nmap, Burp Suite
      • Skills: Packet analysis, network reconnaissance, vulnerability assessment

      SIEM & Log Analysis

      • Tools: ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana), Wazuh
      • Skills: Custom alert rules, KQL queries, threat hunting

      Programming & Scripting

      • Languages: Python, Bash
      • Applications: Security automation, tool development, data analysis

      Operating Systems

      • Linux (Ubuntu, Kali, Debian)
      • Windows (forensics and analysis)

      Current Focus

      TryHackMe Labs

      Actively working through TryHackMe modules to build practical cybersecurity skills:

      • SOC Level 1 & 2 paths
      • Digital Forensics modules
      • Network security challenges

      Personal Projects

      • USB Forensics Investigation: Analyzing USB drives in computer fraud cases
      • DFIR Toolkit: Building custom forensics automation scripts
      • Security Blog: Documenting lab work and learning experiences

      Certifications & Training

      Working towards:

      • CompTIA Security+
      • TryHackMe SOC Level 1 Completion
      • Digital Forensics specialization

      What I’m Looking For

      I’m currently seeking opportunities in:

      • SOC Analyst positions
      • Digital Forensics internships
      • Cybersecurity graduate roles
      • CTF team collaborations

      Get In Touch

      I’m always interested in connecting with fellow cybersecurity enthusiasts, discussing DFIR techniques, or collaborating on projects.
